summary: Deterministic proof for current CLI guide claims covering named-adapter doctor guidance and refresh-plan overwrite protection for saved claim-state paths.

evidenceScope.targetSurface: CLI guide doctor and claim refresh boundaries
evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the current docs/guides/cli.md named-adapter doctor and refresh-plan overwrite claims are marked satisfied.
notClaimed: Plain doctor should auto-select one of several named adapters.
Refresh-plan overwrite protection covers every arbitrary JSON path instead of configured saved claim-state paths.
The focused tests prove production app behavior beyond the named CLI boundaries.

notableAssertions: plain doctor does not guess a named adapter when the default adapter is missing
doctor suggestions mention --adapter-name for named adapter validation
refresh-plan output refuses to overwrite saved claim state
the saved claim state remains a cautilus.claim_proof_plan.v1 packet
doctor help preserves named-adapter guidance in the registered command surface

decision.reason: Focused app and CLI tests verify named-adapter doctor guidance and refresh-plan overwrite rejection for saved claim-state paths against the current CLI guide claims.
